about.title: About Me
about.description: Electronic Engineer and Full Stack Developer. I am passionate about combining my technical background with modern web development to create solutions that work and scale. Currently, I have 3 deployed and functional projects, and I truly enjoy the process of transforming ideas into code. I speak English (C1) and I am highly motivated to join a team where I can learn, contribute my experience, and collaborate in the development of innovative products.
